testcases.input: nums = [1,3,2,3,1] Output: 2 Explanation: The reverse pairs are: (1, 4) --> nums[1] = 3, nums[4] = 1, 3 > 2 * 1 (3, 4) --> nums[3] = 3, nums[4] = 1, 3 > 2 * 1
